highlights.title: Show HN: Ghost Pepper – Local hold-to-talk speech-to-text for macOS
highlights.text: I built this because I wanted to see how far I could get with a voice-to-text app that used 100% local models so no data left my computer. I've been using a ton for coding and emails. Experimenting with using it as a voice interface for my other agents too. 100% open-source MIT license, would love feedback, PRs, and ideas on where to take it.

highlights.title: Show HN: Stop paying for Dropbox/Google Drive, use your own S3 bucket instead
highlights.text:
Last week SWYX nerd-sniped me into building an Open-source Dropbox.

Here is Locker: the ultimate open-source Google Drive/box/Dropbox alternative - Provider agnostic (S3, R2, vercel blob, local) - BYOB (Bring your own bucket) - Virtual file system - QMD Search plugin
